note: The next rung(s) down the cascade (docs/cascade.md): registration-down creates the upstream lifeline a lower vat PRs back through. Each rung declares the shape it charters for and the COMMON CONSTITUTION it OFFERS (its own antidote.yml constitution hash) — bin/distill selects by shape containment and gates every record through judgeConstitution against that offer; a rung offering no constitution receives nothing (no constitution, no catalog). Ships EMPTY: no rung, no down-hop. Example: {"id":"colorado-state","repo":"example-org/antidote.colorado","shape":"colorado","constitution":"sha256:…","signer":"key:sha256:…"}.
